firstPassword.title: Set new password
firstPassword.description: First time sign in. Please set your password.
firstPassword.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters and include lowercase, uppercase, number, and special character

changePassword.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters and include lowercase, uppercase, number, and special character

forcePasswordChange.noneUpdated: No users needed to be updated

pdpa.title: Privacy policy
pdpa.description: PDPA consent for collecting, using, and disclosing personal data
pdpa.body: The school stores personal data for education administration, conduct score records, and related communication.
pdpa.itemIdentity: Full name, student or staff ID, and profile photo
pdpa.itemConduct: Conduct score data and incident history
pdpa.itemContact: Contact details such as phone number, email, and Line ID
pdpa.withdrawal: You can withdraw consent at any time by contacting the school administration office.
pdpa.consentLabel: I consent to the school collecting, using, and disclosing personal data for the stated purposes.
pdpa.userCheckFailed: Unable to verify the user. Sign in again.

pdpaRejected.title: Access unavailable
pdpaRejected.description: You need to accept the privacy policy before using the system
pdpaRejected.body: Under the Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562, the school needs consent to collect, use, and disclose personal data. If you do not accept, contact school staff directly.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your account
resetPassword.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters with lowercase, uppercase, number, and special character
resetPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

validation.tooLong: Must be no more than {max} characters
validation.invalidStudentId: Student ID must contain digits only
validation.invalidName: Name can contain Thai or English letters only
validation.invalidGradeLevel: Grade level must be between 1 and 12
validation.invalidClassNumber: Class number must be an integer greater than or equal to 1
validation.passwordTooWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include lowercase, uppercase, number, and special character
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMax: Password must be no more than 128 characters
validation.passwordLowercase: Must include at least 1 lowercase letter
validation.passwordUppercase: Must include at least 1 uppercase letter
validation.passwordSpecial: Must include at least 1 special character
validation.voidReasonMin: Please enter a cancellation reason of at least 10 characters
validation.roomCountMin: Room count must be at least 1
validation.roomCountMax: You can add no more than 20 rooms at a time
validation.summaryMin: Please enter a summary of at least 10 characters
validation.baseScoreMin: Base score must be greater than 0
validation.deductedMin: Deducted points must be greater than 0
validation.invalidHexColor: Color must be a hex color (e.g. #FF0000)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage system settings: school info, scores, and alert thresholds
settings.importDataDescription: Import student list from a CSV file

settings.logoNotSquareConfirm:
The image is not square. Recommended size is 512x512px or 1024x1024px.

Do you want to upload it anyway?

settings.storageDescription: Choose the provider for school logos, profile photos, and score evidence images
settings.vercelBlobHelp: Use Vercel Blob through BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN. This is best for Vercel deployments and supports private blobs through the app route.
settings.supabaseStorageHelp: Use Supabase Storage as the system fallback provider.
settings.googleDriveDescription: Use Google Drive through a service account and folder IDs for profile photos and score evidence
settings.googleDriveEnabledDescription: When enabled, uploads that use Google Drive will use this configuration
settings.privateKeySecretHelp: This value is secret. Restrict settings access to administrators only.
settings.emailSectionDescription: Send notifications, password reset messages, and reports
settings.resendApiKeyHelp: API key from resend.com → API Keys
settings.resendFromHelp: Verify the domain in Resend before production sending
settings.toolsDescription: Shortcuts for managing data and system configuration
